body:
Carla — pulled the seniority list for Zone 4 Saturday OT. Two hardship filings on file, both current with HR. We work around them or the grievance writes itself. Call me before you post.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Saturday OT posting

body:
Carla — got the Article 14 redline back from the committee. They want the call-in pay language tightened before Friday. I'll have clean copy to you tomorrow morning.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Contract counter-proposal

body:
Carla — hearing on the second-shift OT grievance is set for next week. That makes three open now. I'll write up the timeline tonight and send it your way.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Overtime grievance status

body:
Linda — moving Wednesday Bible study to 7:15 this week so folks coming off second shift can make it. Can you let the rest of the deacons know? I'll post it on the board Sunday.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Bible study time change

body:
James — outreach drive is item 3 on Sunday's agenda. I'll bring the sign-up sheets and the numbers from last quarter. Want me to lead that part or will you?

— Shawn
subject: Re: Deacon board agenda

body:
James — the new study Bibles came in. I'll stock them after service Sunday. Leave me the storeroom key and I'll lock up when I'm done.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Church bookstore order

body:
Raymond — updated Saturday schedule has us at Rouge Park Field 3. First pitch 9am. Tell the parents to get there early, the lot fills up fast.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Wolverines schedule

body:
Raymond — need a final headcount for the season banquet by Friday so I can give the caterer a number. Can you ask your half of the roster? My knees aren't chasing anybody down this week.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Banquet headcount

body:
Raymond — bringing the practice gear Tuesday. If it rains we move to the rec center gym, I already called ahead and held it. Spread the word.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Tuesday practice

body:
Denise — reminder Grandma Ruth's checkup is Tuesday at 10. I've got a steward thing I can't move. Can you take her? I'll have her ready by 9:30.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Ruth's appointment

body:
Baby — looked at a few places near the water for the anniversary. Sending the two I liked. The October long weekend works for me now, the contract stuff should be quiet by then.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Charleston trip

body:
Denise — whole family's coming Sunday after church. I'll fire up Old Faithful Saturday night so the brisket's ready by two. Tell Jasmine to bring her appetite.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Sunday dinner

body:
Hi — this is Shawn Dawson, patient of Dr. Tate. I need to reschedule my Thursday knee follow-up, a grievance hearing landed on the same morning. Any afternoon next week works. Thanks.

— Shawn Dawson
subject: Reschedule knee follow-up

body:
Carla — sending the weekly grievance status doc tonight after dinner. Sorry it's late, it slipped my mind with the board meeting prep. You'll have it before morning.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Grievance status doc

body:
Darnell — Thursday lunch works. Got a steward thing at 11 but I'll be clear by noon. Same diner on Grand River? I'm buying, you got it last time.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Lunch this week?

body:
Linda — count me in for Saturday's food pantry shift. I can do the morning load-in, just not the heavy lifting, the back's been talking to me. I'll bring the truck.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Pantry volunteer schedule

body:
Carla — DeShawn Williams' hardship paperwork is current with HR, filed Nov 14th, I've got a copy. He's covered for the Saturday posting. Don't let them schedule him.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Zone 4 hardship

body:
Raymond — got two kids out sick for Saturday. We can still field nine but we're thin in the outfield. Can your nephew swing by and fill in? Tell him it's just one game.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Saturday roster

body:
Denise — Marcus said he can drive up for Father's Day weekend. Can we put him in the spare room? I'll clear my fishing gear out of there, been meaning to anyway.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Father's Day weekend

body:
James — I'll take the closing prayer Sunday if Pastor's still under the weather. Keep it short, my standing-up time is about what it used to be minus the cartilage. Let me know.

— Shawn
subject: Re: Sunday service coverage

body: Following up on the benefits review notes. Attaching my responses.
subject: Reply to Union benefits review

body: Confirming registration deadlines and roster count for the upcoming session.
subject: Reply on softball registration

body: Thoughts on the fellowship hall repairs and Q4 budget allocation.
subject: Reply to deacon budget request

body: Available Thursday evening as usual. Bringing notes on Ephesians 4.
subject: Reply on Sunday sermon prep

body: Sending updated pharmacy contact for the refill.
subject: Reply on medication refill

body: Adding a note and a small check for gas. Should ship by Wednesday.
subject: Reply on Marcus care package

body: Two lodging options look best. Sending the comparison.
subject: Reply on Charleston lodging

body: Booked oil change and tire rotation for next Saturday morning.
subject: Reply on truck oil change

body: Weighing the pros and cons with your mother. Talk this weekend.
subject: Reply on Jasmine Boston offer

body: Reviewed all three sites. Prefer the community hospital option.
subject: Reply on Marcus practicum
